## What & why

Briefly: what this changes and the reason.

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] New capability
- [ ] Docs / references
- [ ] Breaking change (invocation or behaviour)

## Compliance guard (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)

- [ ] **Prime Directive** intact — no behaviour that fabricates sources, figures, quotes, records, or URLs.
- [ ] **Collection boundaries** intact — open-source and lawful only; no dark-web / stolen-data / private-individual PII.
- [ ] New **leading words** are defined in both `CONTEXT.md` and `skills/black-sea/references/glossary.md`.
- [ ] Changed `SKILL.md` steps keep a checkable **`Done when`**; `SKILL.md` is still under ~500 lines.
- [ ] `forensics.py` still passes `python3 skills/black-sea/scripts/forensics.py --demo` (if touched).
- [ ] A **changeset** is included (`npx changeset`); `docs/black-sea.md` re-synced if behaviour changed.

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, or open questions.
